productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Club Red Blue Flip Flop
description: Get ready for that long overdue trip to the beautiful woodlands. lotto brings to you Wave Chic, the perfect floater for your trip. Soft and cushy, the slippers help relax your tired feet and bring back the spring in your gait in style.Upper Foam thong straps for lightweight durability and customised Fit Fabric toe separator for comfort Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for soft feel and maximum comfort Printed and textured footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with diamond pattern lugs for good grip and traction on all surfaces shoe careDo not machine washRub surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
